# warmup

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Declared heavy boot warm-up category: defineWarmup registers a deferred, throttled, scope-gated warm-up; drainWarmups drains them after onAllReady under a concurrency gate + heavy-read slot + macrotask yield.
- Server:
  - Uses: `infra/host-read-pool.withHeavyReadSlot`, `infra/paths.isMain`
  - Exports: Types: `WarmupSpec`; Values: `defineWarmup`, `drainWarmups`, `WARMUP_CONCURRENCY`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/pages/content-search`, `apps/sonata/sources/midi/folders`, `infra/corpus-index`, `reports`, `stats/cost`, `tasks`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
